a: Yes. Local pickup is available during store hours. Orders are usually ready within 2 business hours unless the product page says otherwise.

q: How do I check if an item is in stock?
a: Inventory is synced from the E-Series backend. If the item or variant shows in stock, it is currently available to sell.
Unused items can be returned within 30 days with the original receipt. Clearance items and special orders are final sale.
